title: viola sylvestris var. macrantha
intro: Viola sylvestris var. macrantha, also known as the large-flowered pansy or greater pansy, is a perennial plant species in the viola genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Viola sylvestris var. macrantha can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
